text.message: I mean, you loward your chances and zeroed mine

Or I’m going to have to target you all game
Either take it or I’m targeting you cause that’s not cool
actually it was not a mistake
Nah he can remediate this still
I’m trying to make it fair
i said yes after he moved it
so i dont need to accept that
you have the best setup and only good setup
It’s you all game I guess red
so im not throwing like you

Ruins the integrity of the game
I gave you a chance to rectify
targeting because you got nonbinded also ruins the integrity
nonbinding is just as a part of the game as making deals
And targeting is just as much a part of the game as nonbinding
If that’s how people want to play
no it ruins the game entirely
So does nonbinding in my opinion
extorting turn 1 ruins the game imo
you dont seem like a principled human being if you target red the whole game and ruin it for everyone
you ruined you all game blue haha
I’m doing pretty so didn’t ruin the game for me

like i said i typed after you moved it

what do you need to pop

i wont trade you the win
like i said you ruined your own game
nah i didnt have cahcnes here
and decide to solo block me
